CANOPY CRATES

A sense of place. Delivered.
Cairns & Daintree · Queensland
The Opportunity

Visitors leave
without ever truly
tasting the region.

Guests arrive at boutique hotels and Airbnbs with a defined path — reef, rainforest, repeat. The region's most remarkable producers remain invisible. Your products stay off the table.

3.7M
Annual Visitors · Tropical North QLD
↑82%
Growth in boutique & Airbnb stays
0
Curated local hamper services in the region
Introducing

We bring your products
directly into
the guest experience.

Canopy Crates delivers curated hampers — built entirely from local producers — to boutique hotel and Airbnb guests across Cairns and the Daintree. Personally selected, packaged, and delivered by Michelle.

🧺
Canopy Crate
Local Only
Our Range

Four curated crates. Each one a story.

🍳
The Morning Crate
Breakfast in Bed
Local honey, fresh bread, avocado & seasonal tropical fruit. Start the day the Daintree way.
12hr lead time
🍷
The Sundowner
Twilight Picnic
Wine or bubbly from Epicurean, artisan cheese, crackers & seasonal fruit. The best seat in the tropics.
12hr lead time
🍃
Regional Goodies
Gifts of the Region
Daintree Chocolate, Daintree Tea, fermented foods, wellness, dried mango. The soul of the region, boxed.
48hr lead time · Seasonal
🥂
The Celebration
Wedding & Bridal Day
Fully customisable — wine, dips, cheese, local chocolate & wellness. Curated indulgence before your most beautiful moment.
12hr lead time
Why Partner With Us

A new channel for your product.
No setup. No shelf space. No guesswork.

📦
New Distribution
Reach guests who would never have found you — captive, curious, ready to spend.
🔄
Repeat Sales
Guests who love your product can order online — building a new direct channel for your business.
🌿
Community First
We feature your story on every producer card. Your brand travels with every crate.
Simple by Design

How it works for you.

🤝
1
Partner
Agree on a wholesale rate. We handle everything else.
📦
2
Supply
We collect or you deliver. Flexible and low-friction.
🧺
3
Curate
Michelle personally curates and packages every crate.
🏨
4
Deliver
Delivered to boutique hotels and Airbnbs across the region.
✨
5
Grow
Your brand reaches guests, earns fans, builds new sales.
Your products deserve to be tasted. Your story deserves to be told. Canopy Crates is how we make that happen — together.
Michelle, Founder — Canopy Crates
